title: Unlocking Britain’s next era of productivity: Building a nation of AI trailblazers
summary: Google UK发布最新经济影响报告，探讨如何通过AI驱动技术提升英国生产力。报告强调AI赋能个人与企业，推动经济转型，并呼吁政策支持与技能培训。技术亮点包括Gemini模型应用及AI生态建设。
key_insight: AI adoption in UK requires policy support and skill development to unlock productivity gains.
